description_long: This is a vintage-style electric fan with a robust, rounded metal housing painted in a matte blue finish. The front features a protective grille composed of concentric metal rings and radial supports, shielding three large metallic blades with a slightly weathered appearance. The base is sturdy and rectangular, with the word 'Vortex' inscribed in gold, and it supports the main body via a curved arm. A visible black power cord extends from the rear of the base, looping loosely and ending in a plug. The rear of the fan displays a ribbed motor housing with metallic mounting brackets and a central adjustment knob. Brass-colored structural elements connect the motor to the blade assembly, adding a touch of industrial character.
description: A vintage blue metal electric fan with a protective grille, three metallic blades, and a visible power cord. The base is sturdy and inscribed with 'Vortex', and brass accents connect the motor to the blades.
description_view_0: Front view showing the concentric metal grille, three fan blades, and the 'Vortex' inscription on the base.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the curved support arm, the thickness of the housing, and the power cord emerging from the base.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the ribbed motor housing, brass mounting brackets, and the adjustment knob, with the power cord trailing outward.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the curved support arm and the smooth, rounded housing with minimal visible features.
attribute_blade_guard_design: The blade guard consists of concentric metal rings connected by radial supports, forming a sturdy grille that covers the front of the fan.
